sections.paragraph:
Original: גּעל

Transliteration: gâ‛al

Phonetic: gaw-al'

BDB Definition:

  1. to abhor, loathe, be vilely cast away, fall
    1. (Qal) to abhor, loathe
    2. (Niphal) to be defiled
    3. (Hiphil) to reject as loathsome, show aversion

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 369

Part(s) of speech: Verb
